calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: MECH-269 V_s validation entropy probe (cascade gate, instrumentation-fixed)
items.notes: Fix of EXQ-476a env.step unpacking bug (truncated was actually info dict -> break fired every step 0). Same hypothesis: does Phase-1+2 V_s runtime alone break monostrategy action-class lock, or is MECH-284 Phase-3 required? PASS = ON-OFF entropy delta >= 0.1 in 2/2 seeds.
